_comment: Hard safety net against the X API bill (or the legacy 500/month free cap). The pipeline runs in strict priority order and stops posting for the rest of the month once a cap is hit, so whale/news alerts are always protected first and low-priority filler (flashback, polls, retweets, ai_manager) is throttled first. Set 'mode' to 'usd' if you're on X API pay-per-use pricing (default in 2026), or 'posts' if you still have a legacy free-tier account with a hard post-count cap. Sized alongside config/claude_budget.json's monthly_usd_cap so the two sum to the account-wide monthly ceiling -- see README.
